creator: mph@pobox.com
text:
On Sat, Oct 25, 1997 at 10:31:09PM +0300, Sander Vesik wrote:

> >Environment:
> 
> 2.2 Stable, angband-2.8.1 package taken from packages-current

I am the maintainer of the Angband port.

The current version is angband-2.8.2.  It is in packages-stable on
ftp.freebsd.org.  Please try that version and report back if problems
persist.

To the ports committers: PR ports/4583 contains a patch I submitted
to this port over a month ago.  Could someone review and commit it,
please?

-- 
Matthew Hunt <mph@pobox.com> * Think locally, act globally.
finger hunt@mph124.rh.psu.edu for PGP public key.
